description: Kyivstar Group Ltd. provides a range of mobile communication and broadband services for individual and corporate customers in Ukraine. The company offers a range of connectivity and digital services, including mobile and fixed-line voice and data, ride-hailing, e-health, digital TV, a suite of self-service options, and enterprise solutions, such as Big Data, cloud, and cybersecurity under Kyivstar TV, Helsi, MyKyivstar, Kyivstar.Tech, and Uklon platforms. It also provides internet services such as corporate internet access, fixed-line telephone, data transmission and fixed-mobile convergence,
